articles.author: Rebecca Falconer
articles.title: Rudy Giuliani in "critical" condition in hospital, spokesperson says - Axios
articles.description: "We do ask that you join us in prayer for America's Mayor," his spokesperson Ted Goodman said.
articles.content:
Rudy Giuliani was hospitalized and is in "critical" but stable condition, the former Trump lawyer and New York City mayor's spokesperson said in a Sunday evening statement.
